name: ai-research-skills
description: Researcher-facing Claude Code skills for Zotero, Obsidian, NotebookLM, research memory, and paper workflows.

metadata.description: Catalog of AI skills for the research workflow — researcher-led, AI-assisted

plugins.name: research-workspace
plugins.description: 10 research-hub skills: literature search, comparison matrix, planning manifests, design dialog, multi-AI routing, NotebookLM brief verification, paper-memory builder, paper-summarize, Zotero curator. Auto-discovered from the source repo's skills/ subdirectory.

plugins.name: academic-writing-skills
plugins.description: Manuscript revision, claim-evidence audit, banned-word / humanize pass, figure-text consistency, journal-format check, reviewer response.

plugins.name: audit-first-skills
plugins.description: 5 skills (verify-references, senior-author-review, abstract-writer, scientific-writing, skill-lint) for the audit-first researcher: verify a paper's claims, audit numerical results, draft 6-part abstracts, enforce water-resources style, lint other skills. The lean alternative to ARS — bundled with 5 machine-checked invariants (audit budget, no declarative-only gates, eval mix, anti-hype README, honest provenance). MIT.

plugins.name: zotero-skills
plugins.description: Full Zotero CRUD: search, add, update, delete items with notes, tags, collections, and PDF attachments. Dual local/Web API routing.

plugins.name: codex-delegate
plugins.description: Hand token-heavy mechanical work (batch edits, scaffolding, refactors, test generation, plotting scripts) from Claude to Codex CLI.

plugins.name: gemini-delegate
plugins.description: Hand long-context reading, bilingual rewrites, second-opinion review, and Traditional Chinese / CJK output from Claude to Gemini CLI.
